roadmap.title: Induction and the Office Sector
roadmap.description: Learn the facility systems, clear the opening story objectives, and finish the optional Office tasks before entering Manufacturing West. In co-op, operate a Keypad Hacker yourself. Explore all of Flathill so the final Power Cell is not left behind.

roadmap.title: Manufacturing West
roadmap.description: Repair the three electron pumps and overload the Synchrotron while collecting the Manufacturing uniform and clearing the train, tutorial portal, and Encroachment branches. Let the 50 Order-soldier counter progress naturally.

roadmap.title: Cascade Laboratories and Security
roadmap.description: Reset laboratory security, craft Antethermite, and open Hydroplant. Clear the available anteverses by their far exits; returning through an entrance or personal teleporter can bypass an achievement trigger.

roadmap.title: Hydroplant and midgame cleanup
roadmap.description: Restore the spillway systems while fishing, recovering the Hydroplant uniform, containing a Leyak, and beginning Kylie's quest. Prepare the neural chip before entering underwater Robotics.

roadmap.title: Reactors and Shadowgate
roadmap.description: Recover Anti-Fungal Gelatin, restore all four reactors, and destroy Shadowgate's five devices. Open the four keyed crate types and let Gatekeeper kills accumulate before any dedicated farming.

roadmap.title: Residence, Albatross, and the ending
roadmap.description: Complete Praetorium and Botanical Wing, finish Kylie's restoration, repair the Residence suppressor, and reach Albatross. Defeat the Wayseeker and stay for the final conversations that register story completion.

achievements.displayName: One Down, One Million To Go
achievements.description: Kill a pest for the very first time.
achievements.summary: Kill one @enemy{Pest} anywhere in the facility.

guide.context: Pests are the small four-legged anteverse creatures encountered immediately after the tutorial, so no special weapon or sector access is required.

steps.text: Attack any @enemy{Pest} until it dies; the first Pest kill unlocks the achievement.

achievements.description: Hack a door or other security feature.
achievements.summary: Personally use a @item{Keypad Hacker} on any compatible security keypad.

guide.context: Alice Mayfield can provide the crafting route. In multiplayer, every player seeking the achievement must operate a hacker themselves; a teammate opening the door gives no credit.

steps.text: Speak with @npc{Alice Mayfield}, obtain the relevant components, and craft a @item{Keypad Hacker}.
Equip the Keypad Hacker and personally complete a hack on a compatible keypad.

achievements.description: Cultivate any crop
achievements.summary: Plant a seed in a @item{Garden Plot}, keep it watered, and let the crop reach full maturity.

guide.context: Growth advances while the plot contains water. Harvesting early is unnecessary and can delay the achievement because only a fully grown crop counts.

steps.text: Build or find a @item{Garden Plot}, add soil if required, and plant any crop seed.
Keep the plot supplied with water until the planted crop reaches its final growth stage.

achievements.description: You've taken your first steps into the GATE Cascade Research Facility.
achievements.summary: Finish the opening tutorial and leave the induction area for the GATE Cascade Research Facility.

guide.context: The tutorial ends after the tram disaster and teaches the basic power-routing interaction used throughout the facility.

steps.text: Redeploy the @item{Heater} in the damaged tram area and connect it to power.
Follow the objective route into @loc{The Office Sector} until the tutorial completion registers.

achievements.description: Open the route from the Office Sector into Manufacturing West.
achievements.summary: Complete the @loc{Office Sector} by powering the forklift and opening the route into Manufacturing West.

guide.context: Warren directs the route after the Cafeteria opens. Flathill's portal in Silo 3 supplies the Power Cell needed for the forklift.

steps.text: Open the @loc{Cafeteria}, report to @npc{Warren}, and follow the objectives to the @loc{Silo 3} portal.
Enter @loc{Flathill} and return with at least one @item{Power Cell}.
Install the Power Cell in the forklift and use the newly opened access route into @loc{Manufacturing West}.

achievements.description: Open the route from Manufacturing West into Cascade Laboratories.
achievements.summary: Repair all three electron pumps and overload the Manufacturing West Synchrotron to enter Cascade Laboratories.

guide.context: The Blacksmith and Frake anchor this sector's objectives. Each yellow, green, and red pump route contributes to the Synchrotron overload.

steps.text: Meet the @npc{Blacksmith} and @npc{Frake} and accept the Manufacturing objectives.
Repair the yellow, green, and red @mechanic{electron pumps}.
Use the restored systems to overload the @mechanic{Synchrotron} and pass into @loc{Cascade Laboratories}.

achievements.description: Open the route from Cascade Laboratories into the Security Sector.
achievements.summary: Reset Cascade Laboratories security and open the Vacuum Chamber route into the Security Sector.

guide.context: The sector combines the Furniture Store reset with Mycofields materials. Anteverse Gel becomes Antethermite, which removes the Vacuum Chamber obstruction.

steps.text: Complete the @loc{Furniture Store} and use its systems to reset laboratory security.
Find @loc{The Mycofields}, obtain @item{Anteverse Gel}, and craft @item{Antethermite}.
Use Antethermite to open the @loc{Vacuum Chamber} and enter the @loc{Security Sector}.

achievements.description: Have an accident after Continence reaches zero.
achievements.summary: Let @mechanic{Continence} fall to zero without using a toilet so your character defecates on the floor.

guide.context: Continence decreases naturally after eating. A toilet resets the need, so avoid every toilet while preparing this unlock.

steps.text: Eat normally, ignore the toilet warning, and wait until @mechanic{Continence} reaches zero and the accident occurs.

achievements.description: You created your very first item, all by yourself, probably.
achievements.summary: Use a @item{Crafting Bench} to craft any item.

guide.context: The portable crafting menu does not satisfy this achievement; the completed item must come from a placed Crafting Bench.

steps.text: Interact with a powered @item{Crafting Bench}, choose any available recipe, and finish crafting the item.

achievements.description: Equip an item into every available slot, at the same time.
achievements.summary: Fill any seven of the eight equipment slots with armor, a headlamp, shield, and trinkets.

guide.context: One equipment slot may remain empty. Ordinary clothing does not fill armor slots, while a valid shield or trinket does count toward the seven-slot total.

steps.text: Equip items until seven equipment-slot icons are occupied at the same time.

achievements.description: Equip a complete armor set with a unique buff.
achievements.summary: Equip all four pieces of one armor set at the same time to activate its set bonus.

guide.context: The Office-only Makeshift set is the earliest practical option: Helmet, Armwraps, Chestplate, and Legwraps activate the Employee of the Month bonus together.

steps.text: Collect Office supplies and craft the @item{Makeshift Helmet}, @item{Makeshift Armwraps}, @item{Makeshift Chestplate}, and @item{Makeshift Legwraps}.
Equip all four Makeshift pieces simultaneously and confirm the @mechanic{Employee of the Month} set effect appears.

achievements.description: Complete The Mycofields while owning and wearing a Mushroom Helmet.
achievements.summary: Complete @loc{The Mycofields}, craft a @item{Mushroom Helmet}, and wear the helmet.

guide.context: The helmet recipe uses fungal materials obtained from Mushroom Carbuncles. Both the anteverse completion and the equipped helmet are required on the same save.

steps.text: Kill and harvest @enemy{Mushroom Carbuncles} for the materials needed by the @item{Mushroom Helmet} recipe.
Reach and use @loc{The Mycofields} upper exit portal.
Craft the Mushroom Helmet at a bench and equip it.

achievements.description: Take down 50 combatants from The Order, by any means available.
achievements.summary: Kill 50 @enemy{Order soldiers} across Grunt, Captain, Medic, Breacher, and Sniper variants.

guide.context: The counter is cumulative across the save and accepts the listed Order combat roles. Natural encounters provide steady progress, so postpone farming until late in the story.

steps.text: Kill Order Grunts, Captains, Medics, Breachers, and Snipers whenever they appear.
Continue until the cumulative Order-soldier kill count reaches @mechanic{50}.

achievements.description: Wear a Rat Suit and Rat Pack at the same time.
achievements.summary: Equip a @item{Rat Suit} and @item{Rat Pack} simultaneously.

guide.context: The Rat Suit is a chance-based harvest from a Lab Rat or Garage Rat. The Rat Pack has a special condition: kill a Lab Rat with blunt damage while it remains trapped by a Net Launcher.

steps.text: Kill a @enemy{Lab Rat} or @enemy{Garage Rat}, harvest its remains, and repeat until the @item{Rat Suit} drops.
Trap a Lab Rat with a @item{Net Launcher}, then kill it with a blunt weapon before the net releases it; avoid damage-over-time effects.
Wear the @item{Rat Suit} while the @item{Rat Pack} occupies its equipment slot.

achievements.description: Collect the full Manufacturing uniform.
achievements.summary: Interact with the dead engineer in @loc{Manufacturing West Upper Shipping} to equip the full Manufacturing uniform.

guide.context: The body is near the lift above the Garage; the uniform is awarded as a complete outfit rather than assembled from random drops.

steps.text: Take the lift near the @loc{Garage} to @loc{Upper Shipping} and locate the dead Manufacturing worker.
Interact with the body and equip the awarded Manufacturing uniform.

achievements.description: Open the route from the Security Sector into Hydroplant.
achievements.summary: Survive the Security Sector and Canaan, then unlock the final Security door leading to Hydroplant.

guide.context: The surface-elevator crash diverts the route through Canaan. Opening the remaining gates there restores access to the last Security objective.

steps.text: Traverse @loc{Security Sector} and reach the @mechanic{Surface Elevator}.
After the crash, explore @loc{Canaan} and open the remaining gates.
Return to Security, unlock its final door, and pass into @loc{Hydroplant}.

achievements.description: Reactivate Hydroplant's spillway systems and enter Reactors.
achievements.summary: Restore Hydroplant's electrical station, spillway computer, reservoir valves, and transmission tower to open the spillway route into Reactors.

guide.context: The four systems form one objective chain: power and computer control enable the valves, while the tower interference must be blocked before the spillway can operate.

steps.text: Find the survivors and reactivate the @mechanic{Electrical Station}.
Reboot the @mechanic{Spillway Computer} and open the reservoir flow valves.
Reach the transmission tower and block the source of its interference.
Open the spillway and follow the route into @loc{Reactors}.

achievements.description: Escape Voussoir through its far-end cave portal.
achievements.summary: Cross @loc{Voussoir} and return through the portal in the cave at the far end.

guide.context: The portal sits inside the Neutrino Detector complex. Cold is the main hazard, so +3 cold resistance is recommended; using the exit also opens access to the Jetpack area.

steps.text: Find the portal inside the @loc{Neutrino Detector} and enter @loc{Voussoir} with strong cold protection.
Follow the mountain route to the cave at the far end.
Use the cave portal to return rather than backtracking or teleporting.

achievements.displayName: We Don't Talk About That Place
achievements.description: Reach Some Distant Shore through a Portal Toilet.
achievements.summary: Sit on a @mechanic{Portal Toilet} with 15 or less Continence and trigger its random trip to @loc{Some Distant Shore}.

guide.context: Toilet Time or Toilet Emergency must be active. Before the achievement is earned, each qualifying use has a 50% trip chance; later trips use the normal 5% chance.

steps.text: Let @mechanic{Continence} fall to 15 or less, then confirm that Toilet Time or Toilet Emergency is active.
Sit on a @mechanic{Portal Toilet}; repeat qualifying uses until it sends you to @loc{Some Distant Shore}.
After the achievement unlocks, walk into the ocean to return to the facility.

achievements.description: Find the hidden wall tile and escape the Pool Room.
achievements.summary: Enter the @loc{Pool Room} through the Red Chair, press the small raised wall tile, and leave through the opened gate.

guide.context: The tile has a slightly different color and a randomized position on the curved walls or pillars. An invisible creature patrols the water while you search.

steps.text: Sit in the @mechanic{Red Chair} designated IS-0018 in @loc{Cascade Laboratories}.
Inspect the rounded walls and pillars for a small off-color raised tile and press it.
Pass through the large gate opened by the tile and exit the @loc{Pool Room}.

achievements.description: Escape the Furniture Store through its top-floor portal.
achievements.summary: Press all five randomized buttons in the @loc{Furniture Store}, ride the powered elevator, and use the top-floor exit portal.

guide.context: At least one button appears on each of the store's three floors, and their positions change between visits. Zombies begin spawning after the first activation.

steps.text: Search all three floors in one visit and press the five illuminated wall buttons.
After the fifth button powers the central elevator, ride it to the top floor.
Leave through the top-floor portal to register the completion.

achievements.description: Touch the grass inside the World in Mirror.
achievements.summary: Open the IS-0855 cell in upper Cascade Laboratories with a Tier 5 @item{Keypad Hacker} and touch the grass inside the @loc{World in Mirror}.

guide.context: This anteverse is behind a high-tier security hatch and is optional; obtaining Tier 5 hacking access is the practical prerequisite.

steps.text: Reach the upper level of @loc{Cascade Laboratories} and hack the IS-0855 cell with a Tier 5 @item{Keypad Hacker}.
Enter the @loc{World in Mirror} and physically walk onto the grass.

achievements.description: Enter the final Nightsphere chamber in The Night Realm.
achievements.summary: Step inside @loc{The Night Realm} room that holds the last @mechanic{Nightsphere}.

guide.context: Reaper gateways provide access, and each Nightsphere clears a corresponding shadow in Security. If the last sphere is destroyed from outside its room, another gateway or a personal teleporter can revisit the chamber.

steps.text: Use a @mechanic{Reaper gateway} to enter @loc{The Night Realm}.
Follow the Nightsphere route and step inside the room containing the final @mechanic{Nightsphere}.

achievements.description: Exit The Mycofields through its upper portal.
achievements.summary: Climb through @loc{The Mycofields} and return through the portal at the top of the anteverse.

guide.context: Extreme heat is the principal environmental hazard; a Fire Proximity Suit or equivalent heat protection makes the ascent substantially safer.

steps.text: Equip strong heat protection before entering @loc{The Mycofields}.
Follow the upward route through the fungal terrain.
Use the portal at the top rather than returning through the entrance or a personal teleporter.

achievements.displayName: It Only Gets Stranger From Here
achievements.description: Reach the Far Garden's exit portal.
achievements.summary: Enter the @loc{Far Garden} from Office Sector Level 3 and approach its return portal.

guide.context: The achievement is tied to the portal at the far end, not merely entering the anteverse. A railing shortcut can bypass its trigger, so follow the intended route.

steps.text: Use the @loc{Office Sector Level 3} portal to enter the @loc{Far Garden}.
Traverse the islands by the normal path and walk up to the far return portal until the achievement unlocks.

achievements.description: Exit the train route through its far-end portal.
achievements.summary: Ride the Manufacturing West train and leave through the portal at the far end of the train route.

guide.context: The tram station lies near the old mines and requires the Tram Station Key. Returning by the entrance or a personal teleporter skips the achievement trigger.

steps.text: Obtain the @item{Tram Station Key} and unlock the station near the @loc{Manufacturing West mines}.
Board the train, traverse the destination, and return through its far-end portal.

achievements.description: Recover the final Power Cell from Flathill.
achievements.summary: Collect the final @item{Power Cell} in @loc{Flathill} before leaving the anteverse.

guide.context: The Office story accepts a single Power Cell, but this achievement requires Flathill's last cell; continue the local objectives instead of departing early.

steps.text: Complete the routes through @loc{Flathill} and collect every @item{Power Cell}.
Pick up the final Power Cell to trigger the achievement, then return through the portal.

achievements.description: Escape Rise Facility through its far-end portal.
achievements.summary: Solve the Adjustment Wing laser puzzle, traverse @loc{Rise Facility}, and leave through its portal at the end.

guide.context: Antethermite is needed to burn the obstruction that exposes this route. The achievement is awarded by the destination's exit, not its entrance.

steps.text: Use @item{Antethermite} on the obstruction and solve the laser puzzle in the @loc{Adjustment Wing}.
Enter @loc{Rise Facility} and complete its route.
Use the portal at the far end to return to the facility.

achievements.description: Inspect the crushed Pest Dummy in the tutorial facility.
achievements.summary: Use Manufacturing West's mine portal, return to the tutorial facility, and inspect the debris-trapped @mechanic{Pest Dummy} in Staff Processing.

guide.context: This portal revisits a tutorial facility rather than advancing the main route. The target is a physical training dummy trapped beneath debris.

steps.text: Search the @loc{Manufacturing West mines} for the tutorial gateway and travel through it.
Reach @loc{Staff Processing}, locate the crushed @mechanic{Pest Dummy}, and interact with it.

achievements.description: You've successfully caught a fish, but it isn't quite what you expected!
achievements.summary: Hook and land any fish with a fishing rod.

guide.context: Pull opposite the fish's movement to exhaust it, and reel only while it stops struggling; forcing the reel during a run risks losing the catch.

steps.text: Cast a fishing rod into valid water and wait for a bite.
Move the rod opposite the fish's direction, reel while the fish pauses, and repeat until the fish is landed.

achievements.description: Catch any rare fish with its applicable bait or special lure.
achievements.summary: Use the applicable bait or special lure, then land any rare fish with a fishing rod.

guide.context: Most rare fish require ordinary bait, while rare Chordfish and Inkfish instead use a Fog Lantern or Night Helmet as their lure. Fishing level 3 hotspots prevent junk catches, level 5 Tacklebox shortens fights, and the level 10 Lucky Fishing Hat improves rare odds.

steps.text: Select bait through the reload control, or equip the Fog Lantern or Night Helmet lure when targeting a rare Chordfish or Inkfish.
Cast at a fishing hotspot and land catches until a rare variant appears.
Complete the tension sequence and bring the rare fish ashore.

achievements.description: Collect the full Hydroplant uniform.
achievements.summary: Interact with the dead Hydroplant worker in the underwater elevator shaft to equip the full Hydroplant uniform.

guide.context: The body is inside a flooded vertical shaft, so bring sufficient air or diving support before attempting the recovery.

steps.text: Locate and descend into the underwater elevator shaft in @loc{Hydroplant}.
Find the dead worker, interact with the body, and equip the awarded Hydroplant uniform.

achievements.description: Defeat Niketas the Priest in Canaan.
achievements.summary: Find and kill @enemy{Niketas the Priest} in the large hilltop church in @loc{Canaan}.

guide.context: Niketas is heavily protected; holy damage bypasses his armor, while ranged attacks and slushie effects help control the fight.

steps.text: Return to @loc{Canaan} and enter the large church on the hill.
Defeat @enemy{Niketas the Priest}; use holy damage to ignore his armor if available.

achievements.description: Escape the Royal Range after collecting seven Royal Crowns.
achievements.summary: Collect seven @item{Royal Crowns} in the @loc{Royal Range}, open its exit, and use the portal.

guide.context: The frozen IS-0083 cell in Helmholtz requires Tier 5 hacking access. Any seven of the eight crowns open the route, and at least +2 cold resistance is recommended.

steps.text: Hack the IS-0083 cell in @loc{Helmholtz} with a Tier 5 @item{Keypad Hacker} and enter the @loc{Royal Range}.
Explore the range and collect @mechanic{7 of 8 Royal Crowns}.
Open the final route with the crowns and use the exit portal.

achievements.description: Recover Anti-Fungal Gelatin and escape The Village.
achievements.summary: Take the @item{Anti-Fungal Gelatin} from the central structure in @loc{The Village} and leave through the red portal beyond the bridge.

guide.context: The Village portal is near Reactors. Picking up the gelatin opens the far route, and the achievement requires the red exit portal rather than an entrance return.

steps.text: Use the portal near @loc{Reactors} to enter @loc{The Village}.
Reach the central island structure and collect the @item{Anti-Fungal Gelatin}.
Cross the opened bridge route and leave through the red exit portal.

achievements.description: Reactivate the Dusk Reactor.
achievements.summary: Clear the fungal obstruction with @item{Anti-Fungal Gelatin} and reactivate the @mechanic{Dusk Reactor}.

guide.context: Dusk is the first reactor in the restoration chain. The gelatin recovered from The Village removes the growth blocking reactor access.

steps.text: Use @item{Anti-Fungal Gelatin} on the fungal obstruction in @loc{Reactors}.
Reach the @mechanic{Dusk Reactor}, complete its local controls, and reactivate it.

achievements.description: Restore the reactor network and pass through Shadowgate.
achievements.summary: Restore the Dusk, Gale, Mist, and Cloud reactors, access the Fusion Generator, and complete Shadowgate.

guide.context: Reactors is the longest system-restoration sector. Dusk starts the sequence; the Fusion Generator route opens only after the remaining reactors are online.

steps.text: Reactivate @mechanic{Dusk}, @mechanic{Gale}, @mechanic{Mist}, and @mechanic{Cloud}.
Use the restored reactor network to access the @mechanic{Fusion Generator}.
Enter @loc{Shadowgate}, destroy its five containment devices, and pass through the rift.

achievements.description: Complete Shadowgate by destroying its five containment devices.
achievements.summary: Destroy all five shielded containment devices in @loc{Shadowgate} and enter the opened rift.

guide.context: Null Grenades disable hardlight shields: three outer barriers block the approach, and each of the five inner devices must be nulled before it can be destroyed.

steps.text: Use @item{Null Grenades} to disable the three outer hardlight barriers in @loc{Shadowgate}.
Null the shield around each of the five @mechanic{Containment Devices}, then destroy all five devices.
Pass through the rift opened by the destroyed devices.

achievements.description: Activate the Core in Encroachment.
achievements.summary: Defeat @enemy{Nyth} in @loc{Encroachment}, place its @item{Core Fragment} into the inactive Core, and activate the machine.

guide.context: Encroachment branches from the Manufacturing West mines beyond one of the electron-pump routes. The Core cannot be started until its guardian provides the missing fragment.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Encroachment} from the @loc{Manufacturing West mines}.
Kill @enemy{Nyth} and collect the @item{Core Fragment}.
Insert the Core Fragment into the inactive @mechanic{Core} and activate it.

achievements.description: Complete Praetorium and touch its Sun Disk.
achievements.summary: Complete @loc{Praetorium} and touch the @mechanic{Sun Disk} at the top of its final stairs.

guide.context: After Shadowgate, the route begins through a yellow portal reached from the high Far Garden island. Touching IS-0101 grants Sun-Touched and completes the area.

steps.text: After @loc{Shadowgate}, reach the high island in @loc{Far Garden} and enter the yellow portal to @loc{Praetorium}.
Traverse Praetorium to the final staircase.
Climb the stairs and interact with the @mechanic{Sun Disk} designated IS-0101.

achievements.description: Complete the Botanical Wing objectives.
achievements.summary: Recover two @item{Motion Modules} and three @item{Mystagogue Eyes} in @loc{Botanical Wing}, then help Dr. Cahn activate the @item{Dark Lens} and open the Albatross route.

guide.context: The Botanical Wing includes both present and altered states. Its five named components complete the Dark Lens setup that advances the Residence objective chain.

steps.text: Follow the Residence objectives into the @loc{Botanical Wing}.
Explore both wing states and collect two @item{Motion Modules} and three @item{Mystagogue Eyes}.
Bring the five components to @npc{Dr. Cahn} and help him activate the @item{Dark Lens}, opening the route toward @loc{Albatross}.

achievements.description: Complete the Residence Sector and reach Albatross.
achievements.summary: Repair the Residence suppressor, defeat @enemy{The Fallow}, and reach @loc{Albatross}.

guide.context: Praetorium's Sun-Touched effect and Botanical Wing components feed the sector route. A Flamethrower is needed to melt the ice wall blocking later progress.

steps.text: Complete @loc{Praetorium}, touch the @mechanic{Sun Disk}, and use the opened route into @loc{Residence}.
Complete @loc{Botanical Wing}, obtain its components, and repair the suppressor.
Use a @item{Flamethrower} to melt the ice wall on the objective route.
Defeat @enemy{The Fallow} and continue into @loc{Albatross}.

achievements.description: Defeat the Wayseeker and complete the story.
achievements.summary: Activate the Albatross ritual stone, defeat the @enemy{Wayseeker}, then speak with Dr. Cahn, Janet, the Sister of the Unlost, and Dr. Riggs.

guide.context: The story continues after the boss dies. Cahn and the other survivors must be spoken to around the ritual sequence before the ending registers.

steps.text: Speak with @npc{Cahn} in @loc{Albatross} and activate the ritual stone.
Complete the ritual encounter and defeat the @enemy{Wayseeker}.
After the fight, speak with @npc{Dr. Cahn}, @npc{Janet}, the @npc{Sister of the Unlost}, and @npc{Dr. Riggs} to register the ending.

achievements.description: You fed coffee to an entity that probably doesn't need more coffee.
achievements.summary: Give a hot @item{Mug of Coffee} to a nighttime @npc{Coworker} while it asks for food.

guide.context: Coworkers appear passively near players at night and disappear at 6:00 AM. The drink must still be a Mug of Coffee rather than an empty mug.

steps.text: Make or obtain a hot @item{Mug of Coffee} before night.
Find a @npc{Coworker} before 6:00 AM and give it the Mug of Coffee when it requests food.

achievements.description: Open a Cacophonous Crate with a Porcelain Key.
achievements.summary: Use a @item{Porcelain Key} to open any @mechanic{Cacophonous Crate}.

guide.context: A guaranteed route trades one Symphonist Head to Marion for the key. Convenient crates sit behind the Flathill portal and in the Office Executive Office.

steps.text: Kill a @enemy{Symphonist} and trade its head to @npc{Marion} for a @item{Porcelain Key}.
Use the key on a @mechanic{Cacophonous Crate}, such as the one behind the Flathill portal.

achievements.description: Open an Ornate Crate with an Ornate Key.
achievements.summary: Loot an @item{Ornate Key} from a Captain, Breacher, Lab Rat, Archivist, Assassin, or Garage Rat, then open any @mechanic{Ornate Crate}.

guide.context: Only the six named enemy types carry this key. Early crates include the truck at the Manufacturing West crossroads near the crane and the Mapping Center.

steps.text: Kill and loot Captains, Breachers, Lab Rats, Archivists, Assassins, or Garage Rats until an @item{Ornate Key} drops.
Use the Ornate Key on an @mechanic{Ornate Crate} in Manufacturing West or another sector.

achievements.description: You've unlocked a GATE Security Crate.
achievements.summary: Buy a @item{GATE Security Crate Key} from Warren for one Nyxshade Seed and open a @mechanic{GATE Security Crate}.

guide.context: The easiest matching crate is beside Alice Hong at the Office Level 2 Security door, allowing this cleanup after the required seed becomes available.

steps.text: Trade @npc{Warren} one @item{Nyxshade Seed} for a @item{GATE Security Crate Key}.
Use the key on the @mechanic{GATE Security Crate} beside @npc{Alice Hong} at the Office Level 2 Security door.

achievements.description: Open a Runic Crate with a GATE Defense Rune.
achievements.summary: Obtain a @item{GATE Defense Rune} and use it to open any @mechanic{Runic Crate}.

guide.context: Mystagogues, Jotuns, Chieftains, and Witches can drop the rune; Corrupted Defense Bots can also be harvested for one. Reactors and Encroachment contain convenient crates.

steps.text: Loot a qualifying Gatekeeper enemy or harvest a @enemy{Corrupted Defense Bot} for a @item{GATE Defense Rune}.
Use the rune on a @mechanic{Runic Crate} in @loc{Reactors}, @loc{Encroachment}, or another location.

achievements.description: Defeat a Jotun.
achievements.summary: Kill one @enemy{Jotun} in Shadowgate or Albatross.

guide.context: Jotuns are large Gatekeeper enemies encountered on the late-game route, so the story supplies opportunities without a separate online or challenge mode.

steps.text: Engage a @enemy{Jotun} in @loc{Shadowgate} or @loc{Albatross} and reduce it to zero health.

achievements.description: Defeat 100 Gatekeepers.
achievements.summary: Kill 100 @enemy{Gatekeepers} across Reactors, Shadowgate, Praetorium, and later areas.

guide.context: The kill counter persists across the save. Natural late-game encounters contribute, so finish the story route before deliberately farming respawns.

steps.text: Kill Gatekeeper enemies throughout @loc{Reactors}, @loc{Shadowgate}, @loc{Praetorium}, and @loc{Albatross}.
Farm remaining Gatekeepers until the cumulative counter reaches @mechanic{100}.

achievements.description: Defeat a Symphonist.
achievements.summary: Kill one blind, sound-hunting @enemy{Symphonist} in Flathill or during a Fog event.

guide.context: Symphonists begin appearing in Flathill after the Office-to-Manufacturing route opens and can also invade during Fog events. They are durable and track sound rather than sight.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Flathill} after opening Manufacturing West, or wait for a @mechanic{Fog event}, and locate a @enemy{Symphonist}.
Use a prepared combat loadout and defeat the Symphonist.

achievements.description: Contain a Leyak inside Containment Unit: 91.
achievements.summary: Power @mechanic{Containment Unit: 91}, fill it with @item{Greyeb}, and force a nearby @enemy{Leyak} inside with X-ray light.

guide.context: Two Greyeb fully charge the unit for seven in-game days. The unit must stay powered, and an X-Ray Lamp, X-Ray Tower, OX Lamp, or OX Tower can trigger containment.

steps.text: Connect @mechanic{Containment Unit: 91} to power and load it with two @item{Greyeb}.
Wait for a @enemy{Leyak} and draw it close to the powered containment unit.
Illuminate the Leyak with an @item{X-Ray Lamp}, @mechanic{X-Ray Tower}, @item{OX Lamp}, or @mechanic{OX Tower} until it vanishes and appears inside the unit.

achievements.description: Restore Kylie and reunite with the robot at Albatross.
achievements.summary: Restore @npc{Kylie} in Hydroplant, upload the Kylie Trinket or Kylie (Shield Generator) into the modified Defense Bot in Botanical Wing, and reach Albatross.

guide.context: A Hyper-Dense Neural Chip repairs Kylie's underwater Robotics terminal. Upgrading the trinket into Kylie (Shield Generator) is safe because the Botanical Wing upload accepts either form.

steps.text: Craft a @item{Hyper-Dense Neural Chip} from 4 Reservoir Growth, 8 Circuit Boards, 1 Reinforced CPU, and 1 Sensor.
Reach the underwater @loc{Robotics} subsection of Hydroplant, repair the neural terminal with the chip, and take the @item{Kylie Trinket}.

In the future @loc{Botanical Wing}, use the side walkway near the ruined helix statue to reach the robot workshop and upload the Kylie Trinket or Kylie (Shield Generator) into the modified Defense Bot.
Continue the story to @loc{Albatross} and meet the restored Kylie there.
